# RubRhythm — The Safe, Verified Massage Directory

> The only massage and body rub directory in the United States where every provider is ID-verified. Professional. Verified. Safe.

## What Makes RubRhythm Different

RubRhythm exists to solve one problem: the massage and body rub industry has no trust. Fake listings, scams, and unverified providers put both clients and legitimate professionals at risk. We built the first directory where every Blue Badge provider has submitted government-issued ID and been personally approved by our moderation team.

We are not a marketplace. We are a trust layer. Our content filter automatically blocks prohibited terminology. We comply with FOSTA-SESTA and actively support anti-trafficking efforts. If a provider is on RubRhythm with a Blue Badge, they are real, verified, and professional.

## Trust & Safety Features

- ID verification with government-issued documents (free for all providers)
- Blue Badge system confirming verified identity
- Automated content filter blocking 70+ prohibited terms
- Admin moderation of every listing before approval
- Anti-scam guide for clients
- Anti-trafficking compliance (FOSTA-SESTA, Section 2257)
- Fraud reporting system with severity tracking
- Security logging and IP reputation tracking

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.rubrhythm.com/): Search verified providers across 250+ US cities
- [View Cities](https://www.rubrhythm.com/view-cities): Browse all available cities
- [Get Verified](https://www.rubrhythm.com/get-verified): Free ID verification for providers
- [FAQ](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/faq): Common questions
- [Anti-Trafficking](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/anti-trafficking): Our commitment to safety
- [Anti-Scam Guide](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/anti-scam): How to spot fake providers
- [Law & Legal](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/law-and-legal): Legal information
- [Terms](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/terms): Platform rules
- [Privacy](https://www.rubrhythm.com/info/privacy-policy): Data protection

## Contact

National Human Trafficking Hotline: 1-888-373-7888 | Text "HELP" to 233733
